name: Lazarus Bread Pudding W/Whiskey Sauce
recipeInstructions:
CUSTARD:
Break bread into medium pieces. Add pecans and melted butter.
Arrange in 9x13 pan.
Blend eggs, salt, and sugar lightly with wire whisk. Add vanilla and milk. Blend and strain. Pour over bread and nuts in pan.
Bake at 350°F. in a pan of water for 20-25 minutes. Test with knife.
Note: For custard to bake properly, you must create this double boiler effect. Plan size of pan accordingly.
WHISKEY SAUCE:
Melt butter. Whip in sifted powdered sugar. Fold in eggs. Add whiskey. Serve warm.
I usually reheat this in the microwave before serving just to ensure that the eggs are cooked thoroughly.
I have used butterscotch schnapps instead of whiskey and it was delicious!
